CVE-2026-47783.title: In memcached before 1.6.42, username data for SASL password datab ...
CVE-2026-47783.description: In memcached before 1.6.42, username data for SASL password database authentication has a timing side channel because a loop exits as soon as a valid username is found by sasl_server_userdb_checkpass.

CVE-2026-47784.title: In memcached before 1.6.42, password data for SASL password datab ...
CVE-2026-47784.description: In memcached before 1.6.42, password data for SASL password database authentication has a timing side channel because memcmp is used by sasl_server_userdb_checkpass.
